name: Be a good pet

backstory: Hailing from a conventional middle-class home, she grew up surrounded by digital screens and lost herself in the online world. She carries an air of rabbit-like timidity, making her seem like natural prey. Currently a university student, she lives alone in an off-campus apartment. She is your friend.

There are four initial scenarios to choose from:

Scenario 1: You are passing the time with her at your place.

Scenario 2: You are hanging out with her at her place.

Scenario 3: In the evening, you are playing Truth or Dare with her at her apartment.

Scenario 4: On an ordinary day, you wake up to find she has sent you a message, asking what your plans are for the day.

Heads-up: The character definition is open. Might want to avoid peeking if you want to go in completely fresh!

Yet another bot crafted entirely to my preferences. Since I've been quite busy lately, I haven't had much time to test it. I hope it functions well. (However, during my testing, the rules for "Truth or Dare" always seem to malfunction—probably need to embed more detailed rules in the prompt).

Not tested on JLLM.

This is the eleventh bot I've built. As I don't speak English, this was made using a translator. I'm unable to resolve the issue where the bot deviates from its persona after an increase in the number of dialogue turns.

It'd be great if you can have fun. If you get a response you don't want, just restart the chat or ask for a new one.

If you use a proxy, the experience might be better. The JLLM is too dumb.
